name.description: Optional task name/slug. Defaults to generated task UUID when omitted.

branch.description: Optional feature branch name for collecting task results. Defaults to task name.

parent-branch.description: Optional parent branch used to create task feature branch and merge target.

role.description: Optional agent role used to run task sessions (for example: developer).

deps.description: Optional list of dependency task UUIDs that must be completed before this task can run.

prompt.description: Initial task prompt. This value is required.

parent.description: Optional parent task name or UUID. When set, the task is created as a subtask.
